CHAR 2 x x
GG0170I1_WLK_10_FEET_STRT_CD GG0170I1 Mobility: Ability to Walk 10 feet at SOC/ROC Indicates the patient's ability once standing, to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor,or similar space at the start of care/resumption of care. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04.
